input.tenant_message: The thermostat display is blank and nothing happens when I press the buttons. I replaced the batteries but it's still not working. The HVAC system itself seems fine — I can hear the blower when I flip the breaker but I have no way to control the temperature. It's been stuck at whatever temperature it was at when the thermostat died.

ai_output.recommended_action: Send a technician or maintenance staff to replace the thermostat. Verify compatibility with existing HVAC system before purchasing replacement. Check low-voltage wiring connections at the thermostat base for loose or corroded terminals. This is non-urgent unless weather conditions create a comfort or safety issue.
